title: Software Engineer Intern, Infrastructure
bullets: Designed a replayable, self-improving diagnosis platform that routes requests through deterministic expert rules with a ReAct fallback, continuously compiling validated agent reasoning into production rules through offline learning

Built replayable immutable snapshots by normalizing 8+ heterogeneous infrastructure data sources into a shared intermediate representation (IR) with provenance-aware lineage, enabling deterministic replay, cross-workflow evidence reuse, and reducing upstream IO by 66%

Designed an extensible execution model that separates data acquisition, normalization, and diagnosis into pluggable workflow nodes, allowing new infrastructure systems to integrate without modifying existing diagnosis logic

Engineered a human-gated continuous learning pipeline where agent-diagnosed misses automatically generate candidate rule changes, undergo AI-assisted review and full-corpus replay validation before approval, promoting 500+ production rules into deterministic execution

title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Developed CI/CD workflows automating build, Pytest, and release stages, cutting end-to-end duration by 20% and saving more than 250 engineering hours annually
Built an LLM-based DOM analysis framework that generated 85% of functional test cases and authored 200+ backend test suites, increasing overall code coverage from 70% to 80%
Collaborated with product and UI teams to co-author 50+ API specifications for stream-resource features, reducing integration friction

title: Software Engineer Intern
bullets: Replaced Unix domain sockets with DPDK/libmemif zero-copy channels for high-frequency market-data feeds, reducing local bulk-transfer latency by 23% from 2.4 microseconds to 1.84 microseconds
Refactored the messaging layer into a custom C++ publish-subscribe model and authored 80+ Google Test suites, reaching 85% code coverage
Automated email-to-MySQL partner-report processing with Pandas, eliminating 30 minutes of manual work per report
